历年位次与招生计划.title: Historical Rankings and Enrollment Plan
历年位次与招生计划.text: From 2021 to 2025, the minimum ranking for Physics Category was approximately 22080 → 20713 → 26664 → 29235 → 31746, showing a continuous backward trend overall, with a cumulative backward shift of about 11000 places in the last 3 years, and a baseline of about 31746 in 2025; the university's enrollment plan in Chongqing for Physics Category was 72 in 2021, 82 in 2022, 80 each from 2023 to 2025, and 80 in 2026, unchanged from 2025, with no expansion or contraction.

学校层次与声誉.title: University Level and Reputation
学校层次与声誉.text: Guangxi University is a Project 211 and Double First-Class construction university; its Soft Science Chinese University Ranking has steadily risen from 94th in 2021 to 86th in 2026, reflecting enhanced comprehensive strength; the university's reputation has been stable in recent years, with no significant negative public opinion incidents; its Douyin school popularity ranks 25th overall (relatively hot), with a comprehensive popularity of about 1.83 million, garnering some attention on short video platforms, which may have a mild positive impact on application enthusiasm; in the fifth round of discipline evaluation, Guangxi University has no disciplines rated A- or above, with advantageous disciplines mainly in agriculture, forestry, engineering, etc., offering limited appeal to admissions majors.

专业热度与地域.title: Major Popularity and Region
专业热度与地域.text: 2026 major popularity data shows that engineering majors such as Electronic Information/Communication, Electrical Engineering, and Computer Science continue to be highly recommended, aligning with the university's Physics Category admissions majors (Communication Engineering, Automation, Mechanical, etc.); the number of Physics Category candidates in Chongqing increased from 98,954 in 2021 to 139,478 in 2025, with an estimated 136,895 in 2026, a slight decrease from the high level, easing competitive pressure; Guangxi University is located in Nanning, Guangxi, in the same southwestern region as Chongqing, with strong regional proximity; the university's enrollment share in Chongqing is about 2.0%–2.5%, a moderately low level, with cross-province application willingness limited by regional preferences.

预测结论.title: Prediction Conclusion
预测结论.text: Considering the continuous backward trend of historical rankings, the unchanged enrollment plan for 2026, the slight decrease in the number of Physics Category candidates in Chongqing from a high level, the steady rise in university ranking, and the relatively hot Douyin popularity, it is expected that the minimum ranking for Physics Category in 2026 will continue to shift slightly backward from the 2025 baseline of 31,746, but the magnitude of the shift will narrow compared to the previous two years; the predicted minimum ranking is approximately 31,946, with a range of 31,446–32,446.

major_tier_recommendation_en.overall_advice: For rankings within the predicted range of 31,446–32,446, it is recommended to focus on Tier 2 majors (Mathematics, Accounting, Finance) as the main direction, Tier 1 majors (Communication, Automation, Mechanical) as a sprint, and Tier 3 majors (Chemical Engineering, Water Resources, Civil Engineering) as a safety net. For rankings significantly better than the lower limit of the range (e.g., within 31,000), one can focus on sprinting for Tier 1 popular engineering majors.
